title: HpcBciGoldenBindingSweepConfig.v1
description: Configuration contract for brute-force simulation of HorrorMappingConfig.BCI.v1 profiles across BciSummary and invariant ranges to discover and validate golden bindings that never breach safety caps.

inputGrid.description: Sampling strategy over BciSummary metrics, aligned to bci-metrics-envelope-v2 and any canonical BciSummary struct.

resolutionPerMetric.description: Number of grid points per metric dimension in [0,1]. For example, 11 gives steps of 0.1.

invariantGrid.description: Sampling strategy for contextual invariants such as CIC, DET, SHCI that modulate mappings.

sessionEnvelope.description: Session-horizon envelope parameters for worst-case trajectory checks, aligned to the tension/exposure envelope doctrine.

tensionCap.description: Global cap on the derived tension envelope for this sweep.

maxExposureAboveCapSeconds.description: Optional soft budget for time spent near the cap in derived trajectories.

bindingRegistryRef.description: Reference to the registry of candidate HorrorMappingConfig.BCI.v1 profiles to be tested.

repo.description: Constellation repository that owns the registry.

path.description: Path to an NDJSON or JSON registry of mapping profiles.

policyRefs.description: References to safety policy objects that define hard caps and per-channel bounds.

bindingClampPolicyId.description: ID of the HpcBciBindingClampPolicy.v1 object to use while testing.

intensityPolicyId.description: ID of the bci-intensity-policy-v1 profile used for Dead-Ledger gating.

outputRegistry.description: Where to write the golden-binding registry once the sweep has completed.

path.description: Canonical location for the golden binding registry NDJSON file.

schemaRef.description: Schema ID for the golden-binding registry entries.

sweepStrategy.description: Strategy hints for the brute-force simulation engines.

familySubset.description: Optional restriction to specific mapping families.

maxProfilesPerBatch.description: Allows batching sweeps for large registries.

maxGridPoints.description: Upper bound on the total number of (metric, invariant) grid points. Engines may adaptively downsample if the combinatorics exceed this number.
